programme.desc: The Kilchers pay tribute to the family's patriarch and matriarch, Yule and Ruth, by preparing a feast using strictly old-fashioned methods.

programme.title: Walking the Nile: The Source
programme.desc: Explorer Levison Wood sets out to walk the Nile River from source to sea, an epic 4,200 mile journey. Lev follows the river from the jungles of Rwanda, faces roadside robbers in Tanzania, and receives a blessing from a local witch doctor in Uganda.

programme.title: Walking the Nile: Through the War Zone
programme.desc: Lev continues through South Sudan, escaping the war torn mainland to visit the peaceful and enigmatic Mundari tribe. Arriving in Sudan, 2,000 miles into his journey, Lev faces his biggest obstacle yet: the Sahara Desert.

programme.title: Walking the Nile: The Egyptian Nile
programme.desc: Over 3000 miles and 7 months on foot, Lev enters his final country: Egypt. Passing through ancient cities, and discovering magnificent pyramids and ruins, Lev pushes through the pain of his last miles to make it to the finish line: the Mediterranean Sea.

programme.title: Walking With Elephants: Joining the Herd
programme.desc: Levison Wood is in Botswana to follow the world's largest elephant migration. Travelling on foot 650 miles along ancient elephant pathways, he must overcome dangers in the bush before tracking a large herd of female elephants.

programme.title: Walking With Elephants: Man vs. Elephant
programme.desc: Lev and his guide Kane journey across the saltpans to track bull elephants. When they encounter a herd during mating season their safety is soon jeopardized.

programme.title: Walking With Elephants: Journey's Dangerous End
programme.desc: Approaching the end of their 650-mile journey, Lev and his guide Kane must cross the final leg of the trip by boat where they face dangerous crocodiles and aggressive hippos.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Calm After the Storm
programme.desc: Game Warden Eddins helps a neighbour in need. Reneau responds to a call about a baby red-tailed hawk. Game Warden Richards attempts to serve an arrest warrant. Game Warden Startz patrols solo on the Guadalupe River. Wardens monitor the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Walking With Elephants: Joining the Herd
programme.desc: Levison Wood is in Botswana to follow the world's largest elephant migration. Travelling on foot 650 miles along ancient elephant pathways, he must overcome dangers in the bush before tracking a large herd of female elephants.

programme.title: Walking With Elephants: Man vs. Elephant
programme.desc: Lev and his guide Kane journey across the saltpans to track bull elephants. When they encounter a herd during mating season their safety is soon jeopardized.

programme.title: Walking With Elephants: Journey's Dangerous End
programme.desc: Approaching the end of their 650-mile journey, Lev and his guide Kane must cross the final leg of the trip by boat where they face dangerous crocodiles and aggressive hippos.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Calm Before the Storm
programme.desc: Across Texas, boating and fishing patrols are interrupted by record storms and flooding. Near Austin, Search and Rescue teams save multiple people from dangerous swift water and tornadoes. Wardens chase a felon with an illegal gun in East Texas.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Gulf Recon
programme.desc: A specialty team of Texas Game Wardens spends a week on a floating cabin to stop drug smuggling operations across the border. The K-9 unit is called in to investigate a woman who may be killing owls to sell exotic headdresses.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens go undercover to stop a black market for buying and selling wild animals. A trio of Wardens work the beaches of Galveston and mobilize when an oil spill threatens wildlife. A robotic deer decoy is used to catch night hunters.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Mama Drama
programme.desc: Moe and Lizzy rescue a sick, scared stray, but a diagnosis proves tricky. A friend of the rescue visits in hope of adopting a dog that has previously been overlooked.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Puppy's Journey Home
programme.desc: Villalobos is stretched thin when rescue calls come in one after another. A couple from rural Idaho visits the rescue, ready to open their hearts to a new friend. Mariah and parolee Leigh help a neighbor whose dog has become too much to handle.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A New Year for Villalobos
programme.desc: When a homeless man asks Villalobos to take his puppies, Mariah and Marcel decide to help people living on the streets with their dogs. Tia and Mariah surprise the family with a gift celebrating their bond. And a gift changes the lives of the dogs.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Finally Free
programme.desc: Tia is faced with the biggest rescue in Villalobos history when she gets a call about dogs that have been abandoned. When Tia, M2, Kanani, and Earl arrive on scene, it's one of the worst cases of neglect that Tia has ever seen.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Soul Survivor
programme.desc: A former adopter comes back to Villalobos to find a companion to support her through her battle with cancer. The VRC crew join efforts to rescue an injured stray near the warehouse. And Tia puts a new parolee through his paces.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: New Arrivals
programme.desc: Tania races to rescue a mama dog clinging to life after being in labour for two days. A young woman comes to Villalobos looking for a roommate to share her new home with.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Treading Water
programme.desc: Tania and Mariah make it their mission to help two puppies diagnosed with swimmer's syndrome take their first steps. Marcel rescues a stray dog trapped beneath a house. And a couple from New York are looking for a companion to share their active lives.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Left for Dead
programme.desc: Tia races to rescue an emaciated puppy chained to an abandoned home. A couple visits VRC in hope of finding a younger sibling for their dog. And a Good Samaritan needs help rescuing a stray mama dog still bleeding three weeks after giving birth.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Sisters in Rescue
programme.desc: When a 3-legged dog has trouble finding a forever home, Amanda Giese from Panda Paws Rescue comes to New Orleans to help. Parolee Troy shares some life changing news with Tia and the VRC crew. And, Villalobos helps an employee's dad find a new companion.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Treasure Not Trash
programme.desc: Tania is shocked by what she finds once she gets a stray dog back to the rescue. An empty nester brings her family to Villalobos to help her find a companion. And, the family are determined to solve their messy pigeon problem.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet Mr. Wrong
programme.desc: Daisy's deteriorating memory prompts Brown to get in touch with Daisy's long lost cousin Lorraine. Meanwhile, with Sasha's help, Cora teaches Reggie a lesson when he reveals his old fashioned attitude about gender roles.

programme.title: Movie: Bringing Down the House
programme.desc: A lonely man meets a woman on the Internet who happens to be in prison. When she breaks out to be with him, she proceeds to wreak havoc on his middle-class life.

programme.desc: A stylist opens a beauty salon where her customers are more interested in speaking their minds than getting their hair done.

programme.desc: Dre considers taking paternity leave after he realizes that Zoey is arguably the best child and their bond developed while he was unemployed when she was born. Meanwhile, Bow tries to hide her pregnancy in order to get a promotion.

programme.desc: Dre is excited about doing a campaign with a popular rap star but becomes conflicted when Bow and Ruby provide feedback suggesting it plays on stereotypes. Meanwhile, Bow is determined to get the family to stop eating so much take-out food.

programme.title: Martin: Radio Days
programme.desc: Stan decides to hire a new female co-host for Martin's show to boost the ratings. At first Martin feels threatened by the move, and is very stand-offish.

programme.title: Martin: Blackboard Jungle Fever
programme.desc: When Martin returns to his elementary school for Career Day, he discovers his favourite third grade teacher, Ms. Trinidad, is still teaching there. As they catch up, she makes a pass at Martin while Gina watches.

programme.title: Martin: The Night He Came Home
programme.desc: On Halloween, Martin and his friends gather at his apartment to share ghost stories.

programme.title: Martin: I've Got a Secret
programme.desc: Pam, Tommy and Cole are angry at Martin and Gina when Martin reveals Pam's secret on his show. Martin and Gina's only friends left are Martin's boss Stan and Stan's girlfriend.

programme.title: The Parkers: Cheers
programme.desc: Kim's cheerleading squad auditions Nikki but rejects her, with dire consequences.

programme.desc: Nikki grounds her daughter just before a concert and tries to fill in for her.

programme.desc: Nikki decides to pay tribute to her great uncle for an African-American culture festival.

programme.desc: After Bender flushes Nibbler down the toilet, the Planet Express staff and crew begin to wish that Bender could feel human emotions, so Professor Farnsworth installs an empathy chip which forces him to share Leela's feelings.

programme.desc: Captain Brannigan is court-martialed after he accidentally blows up the DOOP Headquarters.

programme.desc: Bender sells his body, only to have Richard Nixon's head buy it and use it to run in the election for world president. Fearing a robotic Richard Nixon as president, Leela and Fry help Bender as he tries to get his body back.

programme.title: Futurama: Xmas Story
programme.desc: Fry learns just how much the Christmas season has changed in the year 3000 when a robotic Santa Claus terrorizes New New York and the rest of the planet.

programme.title: Futurama: Why Must I Be a Crustacean in Love?
programme.desc: Doctor Zoidberg returns to his home planet for the Mating Frenzy and runs into his high school crush. He tries everything to woo her, but she falls in love with Fry instead.

programme.title: Futurama: Put Your Head on My Shoulders
programme.desc: Fry's flirtation with Amy heats up until she becomes too serious about the relationship.

programme.title: Futurama: The Lesser of Two Evils

programme.title: Futurama: Raging Bender
programme.desc: Bender signs on as the featured attraction in the brutal Ultimate Robot Fighting League.

programme.desc: Two squabbling brothers are propelled into deepest, darkest space while playing a board game they found in the basement of their old house.

programme.title: Movie: The Adjustment Bureau
programme.desc: Mysterious forces keep a politician and a ballerina from having an affair.

programme.title: Movie: The Mortal Instruments: City of Bones
programme.desc: A line of angel warriors protect our world from demons.

programme.title: Home Town: So Long Loft, Hello Home
programme.desc: A family of four has outgrown their loft and is ready to use their all-in budget of $200,000 to move into an family home with a yard. Ben and Erin show the parents two family-friendly houses, including a dated, boxy home with 14 acres of property.

programme.title: Home Town: Home Is Where the Art Is
programme.desc: An artist wants to raise her teenage son in the small town near their friends and family. With a budget of up to $200,000, her wish list includes plenty of room to welcome visitors and a dedicated art studio.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Family House with History
programme.desc: A couple with a 19th-century home want it updated to fit their lifestyle. Dave and Jenny renovate the space while preserving its historic charm.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: From Nightmare Cabin to Family Dream Home
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny modernize a couple's rundown log cabin while keeping its historic integrity intact. The top-to-bottom transformation includes new amenities like a custom live-edge bar, outdoor shower and a brand-new porch.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Life on Marrs: Entertaining Oasis
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny reveal details behind the making of the episode and share fun facts as they tackle a couple's compartmentalized layout, unstable balconies and enormous, rotting tree. Dave adds more space in the kitchen while Jenny crafts a surprise.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: An Old Rancher Gets a Chef-Inspired Facelift
programme.desc: Two restaurant owners live in the house her grandfather built, but it's too old-fashioned for their taste and two active boys. When they call on Dave and Jenny to update their outdated ranch, the results are inspiring, modern and ready for entertaining.

programme.title: House Hunters: Hot Texas House Hunt
programme.desc: An engaged couple struggles to see eye to eye on their house hunt in Dallas. They're ready to leave their apartment and one wants a single-family home with outdoor space for their dogs and entertaining, but the other is set on a low-maintenance townhome.

programme.title: House Hunters International: American Dreaming in Amsterdam
programme.desc: A Georgia couple looks to give their kids an international experience and move for his work to Amsterdam. She's used to a larger home and wants five bedrooms on a canal, but he's watching their budget and wants something smaller with a short work commute.

programme.desc: A couple decides to leave their corporate jobs in Canada and open a bed and breakfast in San Clemente, Ecuador. He wants a place that's beachfront and doesn't mind a fixer-upper project, but she wants something turnkey that's close to amenities.

programme.desc: A new homeowner's first place needs work, so her parents recruit Dave and Jenny to pull off a surprise renovation while she's out of town. The Marrs race the clock to create a quaint, warm and welcoming home that matches the homeowner's tastes perfectly.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Outdated to Modern
programme.desc: A family that owns a local brewery purchased an older home rich with history, but the outdated rooms and obsolete features create many challenges. Dave and Jenny add creative and personal touches like a custom, handmade beer tap.

programme.title: House Hunters: Investing in Flint
programme.desc: A couple loves the city of Flint, Michigan, and are eager to find a new home there. He wants an older, historic home downtown, while she prefers a ranch-style house and doesn't mind renovations and spending more money to get what she wants.

programme.title: House Hunters: Dueling Prices in Arkansas
programme.desc: After a family health crisis, this family is looking to put down roots in their Arkansas community. But they're a whopping $600,000 apart on how much they want to spend.

programme.title: House Hunters: Clear Differences in Chicago
programme.desc: A husband and wife in Chicago have big differences in their dreams for a home. Unwilling to compromise or move out of his comfort zone, he hires his old college buddy to be their real estate agent hoping it will give him an edge.

programme.title: House Hunters: To Downsize or Not in Columbus
programme.desc: A young professional in Columbus, Ohio, is looking for a home with a reduced footprint. However, she still wants enough space to entertain all her college friends.

programme.title: House Hunters: Goodbye, DC?
programme.desc: Engaged college professors search for a home together in the Washington, DC, area. She wants a spacious, single-family home in the suburbs, but he prefers a condo with little maintenance that's close to downtown.

programme.title: House Hunters: Hunting for a Cabin in Broken Bow
programme.desc: A young Texas couple with a new baby wants to buy a vacation cabin in nearby Broken Bow, Oklahoma. He wants lots of room for friends and family to stay, but she'd prefer a one-bedroom place perfect for romantic getaways.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Dysfunctional to Functional Kitchen
programme.desc: Christina returns to work after having her baby, but she may need help from her friends as she juggles a newborn and tackles her new clients' home. The couple wants a bright kitchen with a modern-farmhouse design and a layout that opens up their space.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Wellness Remodel
programme.desc: Christina helps her good friend and business partner, Cara, and her husband remodel their main bedroom and bath. When the couple can't see eye-to-eye on design and unexpected costs begin to mount, Christina faces pressure to make both of them happy.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Bold Kitchen for a Brit
programme.desc: A British ex-pat and his wife decide to renovate their outdated kitchen. Christina designs a modern-Craftsman look for the space, but getting all of the elements to match becomes a huge challenge.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: A Touch of Indecision
programme.desc: Empty nesters are ready for a long-overdue kitchen remodel in their mid-century modern home, and they want tons of glam. All of that fabulousness comes with some sticker shock, however, and Christina must rein in their taste to make it match their budget.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Tournament Round One

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Past Lives
programme.desc: Alaskans seize the longer days to survive the harsh summer landscape.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Full Circle
programme.desc: Alaskans work to secure their legacies and connect to the traditions of the past.

programme.title: Atlas of Cursed Places: The Curse of Vlad the Impaler
programme.desc: Sam investigates the curse of Vlad Tepes with help from emerging science in genetics.

programme.title: Trafficked with Mariana van Zeller: Counterfeiting
programme.desc: Mariana meets the craftsmen who make and sell the world’s finest counterfeit U.S. dollars.

programme.title: Atlas of Cursed Places: The Curse of Vlad the Impaler

programme.title: The Legend of Mick Dodge: Midnight Ambush
programme.desc: When Mick Dodge catches wind that some poachers are scheming to steal trees from a protected area in the Hoh Rainforest, he and his friend Moss Hopper team up on a risky mission to sabotage the heist.

programme.title: The Legend of Mick Dodge: Mission to Main Street
programme.desc: After searching relentlessly for food, Mick Dodge finds the barren forest yields limited options. Mick's growling stomach prompts him to venture into town.

programme.title: The Legend of Mick Dodge: Forest Feast
programme.desc: Summer is finally drawing to a close in the Hoh Rainforest, and Mick Dodge can feel a change in the air. With autumn approaching, Mick’s eager to celebrate the arrival of the new season by ushering it in with his favorite annual tradition.

programme.title: The Legend of Mick Dodge: A Dollar Short
programme.desc: Mick Dodge is wrapping up a morning visit with his old friend Doc Gair and it’s time for Doc to hit the road. Unfortunately Doc’s trusty truck, which serves as both his home and office, won’t seem to start. Luckily, Mick’s the perfect person to help.

programme.title: The Legend of Mick Dodge: Call to Arms
programme.desc: Mick Dodge and an old Hoh rainforest friend sabotage hunters who are illegally trespassing on his property.

programme.title: The Legend of Mick Dodge: Manhunt
programme.desc: In the Hoh Rainforest, Mick is part of an underground community of pioneers who have each other’s backs. When the girlfriend of Mick's long-time student tracks him down seeking help for a serious problem, Mick doesn't hesitate to lend a hand.

programme.title: The Legend of Mick Dodge: Storm Surge
programme.desc: A storm is coming to the rugged shore of the Washington coast. While most would seek shelter from the harsh rain and wind, Mick Dodge is prepared to take on the inclement weather.

programme.title: The Legend of Mick Dodge: The Harvest
programme.desc: As winter moves in, legendary wild man Mick Dodge is on an important mission to track down and harvest his main source of food for the coming months - chanterelle mushrooms.

programme.title: The Legend of Mick Dodge: Naked and Unafraid
programme.desc: Mick loses his gear and his clothes when a routine river crossing goes awry. While this normally wouldn't bother him, the frigid temperature means he must act fast.

programme.title: The Legend of Mick Dodge: Meet the Legend
programme.desc: Mick sojourns to a remote spot called the Highlands - a place that looks out over the entire valley and holds special significance to his family - to spread his father's ashes.

programme.title: Wild Indonesia: Land of Dragons

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Hollywood Drama

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Birth, Wind and Fire
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and team find their hands full with baby animals.

programme.title: When Sharks Attack: Mayhem in Mexico
programme.desc: The waters of Cancun become a hotspot for shark attacks.

programme.title: When Sharks Attack: The San Francisco Slayer
programme.desc: A team of investigators take a closer look at what could be the cause of mysterious and terrifying shark attacks, and reveal the science behind what is driving them toward the crowded waters.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Caligula: Sex, Lies, and Empire
programme.desc: Legendary tales depict Caligula as the most notorious emperor in ancient Roman history, and now, new evidence uncovers the truth behind these lurid stories, revealing an astonishing story of murder, intrigue, and dynastic family power.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Riddle of the Olmecs
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Mexico, gigantic stone heads carve a hidden path to a Mesoamerican mystery; an intrepid expert follows the trail left by long-ago explorers to turn up new clues and reveal the secrets a lost ancient civilization.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Lost Relic of the Ice Age
programme.desc: An Ice Age relic found in a mysterious cave is evidence of prehistoric humans' connection to the supernatural.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Skeleton of Cannibal Cave
programme.desc: A 10,000-year-old skeleton found deep in a mysterious cave points to dark mysteries from humankind's deep history; using cutting-edge DNA technology, experts investigate the latest evidence to shed new light on these prehistoric secrets.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: The Dead Sea Scrolls are one of the Holy Land's greatest mysteries, but new discoveries might finally reveal the hidden meaning behind the strange texts, and as experts get closer to unmasking their author, they find clues of an ancient apocalypse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Medieval Fortress of War
programme.desc: Scotland's most celebrated castle is an astonishing fortress landmarked by centuries of epic medieval warfare. Now, experts use advanced laser scanning technology to reveal the truth behind a mysterious war machine that once stood there.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Troy
programme.desc: The legendary lost city at the center of the Trojan War is Troy, but its existence has never been confirmed. Now, discoveries and cutting-edge science might prove if this place existed, and if the Greeks really conquered it with the infamous Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Medieval Fortress of War
programme.desc: Scotland's most celebrated castle is an astonishing fortress landmarked by centuries of epic medieval warfare. Now, experts use advanced laser scanning technology to reveal the truth behind a mysterious war machine that once stood there.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Troy
programme.desc: The legendary lost city at the center of the Trojan War is Troy, but its existence has never been confirmed. Now, discoveries and cutting-edge science might prove if this place existed, and if the Greeks really conquered it with the infamous Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: The Dead Sea Scrolls are one of the Holy Land's greatest mysteries, but new discoveries might finally reveal the hidden meaning behind the strange texts, and as experts get closer to unmasking their author, they find clues of an ancient apocalypse.

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files: Pharaoh of Niagara Falls
programme.desc: Leading scientists and Egyptologists use state-of-the-art forensics to investigate the Niagara Falls Mummy in the search for its true identity, revealing how a legendary ancient Egyptian pharaoh ended up on the other side of the world.

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files: Egypt's Lost Queen
programme.desc: A brand-new discovery inside a 3,000-year-old treasure chest may lead experts to the Egyptian pharaoh who was erased from history: a woman named Hatshepsut, who was one of the most controversial and successful pharaohs of all time.

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files: Tut's Darkest Secret
programme.desc: Cutting-edge science reveals new discoveries about the mutilated mummy of a young woman with a secret link to Tutankhamun; as experts use modern-day criminal forensics follow fresh leads, the bloody trail leads straight to the Boy King.

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files: Curse of the Warrior King
programme.desc: The mangled mummy of a pharaoh is a 3,000-year-old cold case with brand-new leads; a team of experts in Egyptian archaeology and criminal forensics investigate fresh evidence to discover the truth behind this brutal death.

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files: The Screaming Mummy Conspiracy
programme.desc: The horrifying remains of the screaming mummy have haunted archaeologists for decades, and now, experts uncover new evidence to reveal the treacherous conspiracy that led to this mummy's grisly end.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Doomsday at Dragon's Teeth
programme.desc: Eerie ghost ships stranded in an alien desert, sinister ruins known as the Dragon's Teeth, and a ghostly complex with a bloody past are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare on Blood Mountain
programme.desc: A ghost ship thousands of miles away from where anyone expected, a bridge to nowhere in Florida's Hurricane Alley, and a haunting mountain complex with a bloody secret are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Phantoms of Chernobyl
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted. Explore what happened to the large town located just outside of Chernobyl on the eve of disaster, a fleet of ghost ships, and a dangerous mountain road that changed history.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of Alien Stonehenge
programme.desc: An alien Stonehenge with a sinister purpose, an eerie building filled with strange labyrinths, and an endless concrete track in the middle of nowhere are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Tesla Conspiracy
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a cutting-edge research complex built by a visionary genius, an ambitious Nazi project that met a sinister end, and a Cold War relic that changed history.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Death Star
programme.desc: A Nazi fortress that could have changed history if it was finished, an underwater graveyard of unexpected American treasures, and a network of tunnels hiding a secret history of New York were abandoned for mysterious reasons, and experts investigate why.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Hell Island
programme.desc: Explore a ghost town that was once a dangerous industrial hellscape, a giant warship at the bottom of the ocean, and a top secret relic that could have changed the Cold War.

programme.title: See No Evil: Michigan City Murder
programme.desc: On April 23, 2016, car salesman Hufracio Arteaga is found stabbed to death in his Michigan City office. Surveillance cameras in the area may have filmed the fatal encounter.

programme.title: See No Evil: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: In September 2015, Edward Lowry is found savagely beaten and stabbed to death in a parking lot in South Dakota. With little evidence left behind at the scene, can police painstakingly piece together Ed's last moments from CCTV to find his killer?

programme.title: See No Evil: Right Man, Wrong Man
programme.desc: On June 12th 2013, family man Richard Arenas is gunned down in broad daylight in the driveway of his suburban home with no apparent motive or witnesses.

programme.title: See No Evil: Loretta's Last Valentine
programme.desc: On February 14th, 2014, pregnant college student Loretta Saunders vanishes without trace. Her trail runs cold after she is spotted on CCTV at her apartment building. The race is now on to find her before it's too late.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Girl on the Billboard
programme.desc: After 15-year-old Jasmine Block mysteriously vanishes into thin air, her mother Sarah launches a crusade to find her before it's too late. But when the sickening truth behind Jasmine's disappearance surfaces, it leaves Sarah in shock.

programme.title: Dead Silent: All the Lights Were on
programme.desc: After getting engaged, Nikki Ansley takes a job at a local convenience store in order to pay for her upcoming nuptials. But her best-laid plans are horrifically derailed when two unwelcome customers show up right before closing time.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Money Can't Buy You Love
programme.desc: When a local resident of Dunlap, Tennessee is picking up cans, he makes the shocking discovery of a murder victim's body floating in the river. Authorities must discover first who the deceased is and then who could have committed the horrendous crime.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Witch Hunter
programme.desc: Christmas is ruined when hikers in New Mexico stumble across Roxanne Houston's shallow grave. The murder rocks the community of Taos and tension builds between those with small town values and the outsider lifestyle on the Mesa.

programme.title: Dead Silent: All the Lights Were on
programme.desc: After getting engaged, Nikki Ansley takes a job at a local convenience store in order to pay for her upcoming nuptials. But her best-laid plans are horrifically derailed when two unwelcome customers show up right before closing time.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Money Can't Buy You Love
programme.desc: When a local resident of Dunlap, Tennessee is picking up cans, he makes the shocking discovery of a murder victim's body floating in the river. Authorities must discover first who the deceased is and then who could have committed the horrendous crime.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Witch Hunter
programme.desc: Christmas is ruined when hikers in New Mexico stumble across Roxanne Houston's shallow grave. The murder rocks the community of Taos and tension builds between those with small town values and the outsider lifestyle on the Mesa.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Get Out
programme.desc: Young love leads fifteen-year old high school standout Jessica Keen down an increasingly rebellious path that culminates in a night of grave and unfathomable terror in rural Madison County, Ohio.

programme.title: Diabolical: Control Freak
programme.desc: Donna Scrivo adult son Ramsay in days, and she's worried. She alerts the local police, but days pass with no sign of him anywhere. Then a grisly discovery of a severed human head and body parts along a rural highway reveals a act of shocking violence.

programme.title: Diabolical: Caught in the Cover-Up
programme.desc: In West Bloomfield, Michigan, a simple affair between two coworkers turns complex as the two lovers are willing to do anything...even commit murder... to protect their darkest secret.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: Trail of Evil
programme.desc: In 1979, bar manager Harriet Simmons disappears during a trip to Nashville. In 1987, Jerri Ann Jones vanishes after she gets off work. It would take more than two decades for detectives to learn the identity of their common killer.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: Thirty-one year old Nikki McPhatter is a self-made success story Navy veteran and MBA graduate with a close circle of friends. She's only missing love. When she disappears, detectives follow a trail that leads them into the dark lair of a killer.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: My Friend, the End
programme.desc: When 18 year-old Harmahn Smith goes missing, his parents call on the CMPD to find him. Detectives run down every lead searching for the teenager, ultimately discovering the terrible details of what had begun for Harmahn as an uneventful night out.

programme.title: Lone Star Justice: Killing Fields
programme.desc: As Detective Rasco digs deeper into the death of an army reserve sergeant, plenty of folk may have wanted to see his demise.

programme.title: Lone Star Justice: Cold as Ice
programme.desc: A woman asks Detective Joe Rasco to reopen the 1982 unsolved murder of her cousin Catheryn Powell. In doing so, he discovers a case filled with false leads, dead ends and fake confessions.

programme.title: Lone Star Justice: She Had Everything
programme.desc: The bullet-riddled body of 19-year old college student Amanda Anderson is found by her younger brother, Nate. Detectives interview friends and neighbors, however, it's a microscopic discovery by the forensics team that leads to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: A storm rattles the night in Key Largo, Florida, as an intruder slips silently into the home of newlyweds Michael and Missy MacIvor. As daylight clears away the rain, a nightmare is revealed that will haunt the entire community for years to come.

programme.title: American Nightmare: The Answering Machine
programme.desc: When a charitable, up-and-coming actress is savagely murdered in her home, police believe an angry, revenge-hungry killer is responsible. No one could expect the lies, obsessions, and evidence that will be uncovered in this shocking cold case.

programme.title: American Nightmare: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Winter in Iowa gets an extra chill when Shirley Wilson's son finds her stabbed to death in her home. With no forced entry, detectives believe this grandmother of 12 knew her assailant, leaving the family wondering who has betrayed them in cold blood.

programme.title: American Monster: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: In Pennsylvania, Kevin and Joanne Dowling like to capture their kids' milestones on videotape in their modest suburban home. But when a woman in a nearby town is gunned down - and Kevin is accused of murder - his fate hangs on that same home video camera.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: American Nazis
programme.desc: From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorize the United States in the 1930s and wage a battle against the FBI and an undercover team of amateur spies.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: L.A. Riots: As We Watched
programme.desc: The LA riots of 1992 shocked the nation. It was the most deadly civil unrest in American history. Over 3000 fires were set; over 50 people died; nearly a billion dollars in property damage. For six days in 1992, the world watched as LA burned.

programme.title: Iran Hostage Crisis: As We Watched
programme.desc: In this riveting hour we relive the high stakes drama of the Iran hostage crisis, from the terrifying moment when the American embassy is seized on November 4th, 1979, to the last minute negotiations that freed the hostages 444 days later.

programme.title: Jonestown Massacre: As We Watched
programme.desc: This hour goes inside the People's Temple to see how Jim Jones lured 1000 Americans to Guyana and forced them to die in the largest mass murder-suicide in U.S. history prior to 9/11.

programme.title: Chernobyl Disaster: As We Watched
programme.desc: The catastrophic Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant in the Ukraine created the worst atomic energy accident in world history, endangering the lives of millions of people.

programme.title: Iran Hostage Crisis: As We Watched
programme.desc: In this riveting hour we relive the high stakes drama of the Iran hostage crisis, from the terrifying moment when the American embassy is seized on November 4th, 1979, to the last minute negotiations that freed the hostages 444 days later.

programme.desc: This hour goes inside the People's Temple to see how Jim Jones lured 1000 Americans to Guyana and forced them to die in the largest mass murder-suicide in U.S. history prior to 9/11.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Against the Odds: 46 Days of Hell in Fallujah
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: American Titans: Rockefeller vs. Scott
programme.desc: John D. Rockefeller, the young new king of kerosene, and Thomas A. Scott, the visionary behind the Pennsylvania Railroad Company, battle for control of America's new oil industry.

programme.title: American Titans: Carnegie vs. Frick
programme.desc: Steel magnate Andrew Carnegie and coal king Henry Clay Frick join forces to dominate America's second industrial revolution. Their wealthy empire will crush rivals, destroy the labor movement, and ignite a bitter feud between titans that ends in violence.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Combat Shotguns
programme.desc: Deadly at close quarters the combat shotgun is a powerful tool of any army. Host Wil Willis fires history's greatest shotguns, from the Blunderbuss to the modern Benelli M4 and Mossburg 590.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Tunney and the Spies of N.Y.
programme.desc: While the First World War rages on in Europe, a German terrorist cell is waging its own secret war on American soil. When a New York City cop uncovers the plot, he must fight to save his country before it's too late.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Restoring a Log Cabin in Pipe Stem, West Virginia
programme.desc: Mark and the guys restore an 1856 log cabin using wood from the original cabin, as well as wood from an old barn and a local saw mill. They team up with a local crew called, 'The Good Ole Boys,' to turn all this wood into one complete cabin.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Building the New England Barn in South Carolina
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take on their biggest build yet. They resurrect the massive New England timber frame from last season as a family retreat in South Carolina. It's six days of heavy lifting, precision craftsmanship, and big fun.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Mountaineer Volunteers
programme.desc: Mark donates a timber frame to his alma mater, West Virginia University, as the latest addition to their pioneer heritage center.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Finished Product
programme.desc: Mark Bowe visits finished cabins he helped build in Montana, Texas, South Carolina, West Virginia and North Carolina. Then, there's a big surprise waiting for him in Gatlinburg, Tennessee.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Mountain Lodges
programme.desc: A Colorado couple attempts to build one of the most energy-efficient homesteads in the state. Mother Nature and bleeding edge technologies give them a run for their money as they race to complete their high-end alpine lodge before winter hits.

programme.title: Grand Designs: Unbelievable Builds: Cliffside Coastal Escape
programme.desc: Steve had existing plans for a James Bond-style home dangling over a cliff, so he couldn't help himself when he found a steep lot on the coast of Sydney, Australia. He sets out to build the home, but the intense project tests his abilities and budget.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bamboo House
programme.desc: Bamboo-home architect David Sands builds a getaway in Hawaii with a luxurious outdoor bath area and a detached, starlit master bedroom. But volcanic eruptions threaten to send the project in smoke.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Earth Block Ranch
programme.desc: A family builds thousands of earth blocks while withstanding winter monsoons, freezing temperatures and more to finish their San Antonio forever home.

programme.title: Grand Designs: Unbelievable Builds: Cliffside Coastal Escape
programme.desc: Steve had existing plans for a James Bond-style home dangling over a cliff, so he couldn't help himself when he found a steep lot on the coast of Sydney, Australia. He sets out to build the home, but the intense project tests his abilities and budget.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Victorian Free Classic House
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs return to Hot Springs, VA, to salvage another home before it gets demolished. The house has some great Eastlake hardware worth salvaging as well as Majorca tile, mantles and pocket doors.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Faulty Foundation
programme.desc: A bachelor's dark dining and living room are opened up and become one modern lounge. What was once dirty-carpeted living room with college dorm furniture and a separate ugly dining room gets completely transformed into one hip wine room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bugs, Birds and Bad Plumbing
programme.desc: Moving to the interior of the Dollar House, host and interior designer Nicole Curtis demolishes her heart out and focuses on the disgusting kitchen space as well as adding a half bathroom to the first floor, evicting a few pigeons along the way.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Mantle to Remember
programme.desc: Restoring the first floor of the Dollar House continues as host and designer Nicole Curtis uncovers hardwood floors throughout the living and dining room areas. The dining room hutch is still intact, but there is a whole new fireplace mantle to build.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bathroom Rebuild
programme.desc: Heading up to the second floor, Nicole takes on the bathroom, one of the house's dirtiest and grimiest rooms. She brings it down to the studs, adding clean lines with white subway tile and re-purposes an old dresser into one of her signature vanities.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Garage Door Greatness
programme.desc: With the Minnehaha house still sitting on the market, Nicole decides to put her own house up for sale in hopes that it will sell faster. But before she can do this she gives her garage a much-needed makeover and removes asbestos from her basement.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Unfinished-Finished Basement
programme.desc: Preparing to put her house up for sale, Nicole turns her attention to the cluttered basement and devises a plan to update the space while also keeping the unfinished, industrial feel it would have had when the house was built.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Living Room Revamp
programme.desc: Nicole repairs the hardwood floors in both living rooms of the Harriet Project and searches for replica tile to begin restoring a fireplace in the downstairs unit.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Finished Project
programme.desc: With only a few weeks left to finish the Harriet Project, Nicole and the homeowners divide and conquer to complete the lower unit's living room and kitchen. Nicole visits a local high school shop class to work on a radiator cover for the living room.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: A Century Ago
programme.desc: When Jennifer and Paul's home inspection report came back with only minor repairs, Paul tackled them with enthusiasm. It was not long before they began to suspect that the home inspector had missed some much bigger problems.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: No Breathing Room
programme.desc: James and Doreen were thrilled to be able to afford a house for their growing family. Unfortunately the deal closed before they could read their home inspection report. After moving in they discover problems that made parts of the house off limits.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: One Good Deed Deserves Another
programme.desc: A woman who lost her husband, the neighborhood 'Good Samaritan,' needs help completing many of the DIY projects he had started around the house. So Next Generation is stepping in, and stepping up, to 'Make Things Right' for the widow.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Hiding in Plain Sight
programme.desc: A single homeowner is too proud to ask for help with the maintenance issues and repairs that come with living in an older home. When neighbors begin complaining, Next Generation steps in to help her improve the curb appeal and remove the backyard pool.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Far From Home
programme.desc: A couple relocating to a different part of the city needs help updating their kitchen before putting their house on the market. After a local contractor let them down and drained their budget, Next Generation swoops in to 'make things right.'

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fueling The Fires In Texas
programme.desc: Roger Mooking's quest for lip-smacking smoked meat leads him back to the Lone Star State. In Houston, Texas, Grant Pinkerton is an award-winning pit master who recently opened up his first restaurant.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ for Breakfast
programme.desc: Roger visits two Texas pit masters who give breakfast a wake-up call by adding barbecue. Reid Guess smoked his first brisket when he was just 7 years old, and built his first smoker when he was in 7th grade.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Taste of Texas
programme.desc: The smoke signals lead Roger to two popular food trucks in Texas serving up delicious ethnic eats. In Grapevine, Texas, Roger meets Pit Master Trey Sánchez of Vaqueros Bar-B-Q who is known for combining authentic Texas-style barbecue with Mexican dishes.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hawaiian Heat and Texas Meat
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Aloha State where Chef Lee Anne Wong fires up a custom-made stainless-steel shelving unit with local kiawe wood and prepares a tropical feast of succulent beer-can chicken, slow-roasted fruits and vegetables.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Key Largo
programme.desc: Stoke strongman Eddie Hall lands in Florida Keys, to attempt a conch-fritter eating record, do some serious big-game fishing and try what's billed as the best Key Lime Pie on earth.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Brooklyn
programme.desc: World's Strongest Man winner, Eddie Hall hits Brooklyn to take on a huge Mac and Cheese eating challenge, sample NYC's best cheesecake and bend metal with a Coney Island strongman.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Wilmington, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza, a totally bonkers burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Florida Keys
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to the Florida Keys for a bad-to-the-bone shrimp burrito and Ropa Vieja at a Cuban institution. Then he grabs a fork for the largest slice of pie he's ever seen in The Fish House's Key Lime Pie Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sacramento, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb swings into Sacramento, California, for three gold-standard meals from the Golden State, including a perfectly fried Chinese-American chicken, a savory multi-meat waffle stack.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Best BBQ
programme.desc: Casey's quest for America's best bites has taken him from coast to coast, and it's about time we started celebrating the cream of the crop. Fire up the grill, because this time we’re inducting the Best BBQ in the history of Man V. Food.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Clambake on the Grill
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes a summertime seafood meal that's all about the prep and then letting the foil and grill do the work. He makes foil packets of Clams with Sausage and Peppers and, for dessert, Peaches with Mascarpone and Honey.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Italian Feast on Fire
programme.desc: Michael Symon creates an entire Italian feast over coals on the grill, starting with fettuccine with smoked tomato sauce. His wife, Liz, mixes up creamy ricotta, lemon and herbs for stuffed squash blossoms, and they finish with lemon upside-down cake.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brunchtime BBQ
programme.desc: In Charleston, S.C., Michael Symon smokes a whole hog and makes chorizo from scratch for a saucy BBQ brunch burrito with two different fire-roasted salsas. In Atlanta, an authentic Caribbean roasted pork sandwich has a dedicated local following.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Smorgasbord For A Shark's Appetite
programme.desc: In Savannah, Ga., Michael Symon finds a food truck serving up two can't-miss creations: cheeseburger tacos with a house-made beer cheese sauce and a Jamaican jerk fried fish taco with mango salsa.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Florida Keys
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to the Florida Keys for a bad-to-the-bone shrimp burrito and Ropa Vieja at a Cuban institution. Then he grabs a fork for the largest slice of pie he's ever seen in The Fish House's Key Lime Pie Challenge.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: All-Day Brunch/ Jerk Chicken/ Cupcakes
programme.desc: Brad Miller starts out at Nashville's Sucker Brunch truck, where Chef Michael Gilbert's celebration of breakfast comes in a grits dish topped with smoked Andouille sausage, caramelized onions and spinach.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Sandwiches, Street Food and Cobbler a la Mode
programme.desc: Brad Miller heads to Portland, Ore., to visit Chef Melissa McMillan at her Pastrami Zombie food truck. She shows Brad how to make the truck's namesake sandwich, and he also tries the Cubby Cubano, a twist on the classic Cubano sandwich.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Cream of the Crop
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his day in Louisville, KY., by cutting into a towering stack of thick hot chocolate pancakes. Lunchtime in Louisville means a saucy Mata Hari hot brown.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: All Aboard In Chat-Town
programme.desc: Ali Khan is looking for the best deals in Chattanooga, starting with a glorious colossal cinnamon roll before he digs into an out-of-this-world sweet and sassy lamb burger for lunch.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Culinary Cornhuskers
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his Omaha food adventure with breakfast from a fast made-from-scratch joint offering a crazy good egg boat with hash browns. For lunch, Ali tips his hat to an iconic Omaha lunch with a housemade Reuben.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Far From The Farm
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his day in Des Moines the way Iowans do, with crisp and cheesy breakfast nachos. Then it's onto a roasted chicken lunch with comforting mashed potatoes and onion rings, before snacking on a truly divine Napoleon.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations: Caribbean Island Hopping
programme.desc: Tony travels to the Grenadine Islands to sample local cuisine and explore the Caribbean lifestyle. He tries scuba diving, fishing and hunting for local delicacies.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Seville
programme.desc: Andrew explores the capitol of Andalusian culture, Seville, Spain.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Door County
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern scopes out the down-to-earth culinary traditions of scenic Door County, Wisconsin. Fresh fish from Lake Michigan and local produce defines the Nordic-influenced cuisine of this vacation getaway for nature lovers.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bermuda
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the landscape and cuisine of the island of Bermuda, a 21-square-mile British territory with Caribbean soul.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Washington, D.C.
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern looks at the diverse and monumental eats that define Washington, DC. Full of vibrant communities, DC boasts gastronomy that includes local oysters, Ethiopian chicken stew, spicy Chinese stir-fry and chilli-smothered sausages.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Spice Up Your Life
programme.desc: Forget about standard spicy seasonings. Eddie Jackson rounds up dishes made with the hottest, zippiest and peppiest peppers out there.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Deep-Fried Frenzy
programme.desc: Nothing's better than a little batter and hot oil. Eddie Jackson tracks down the crunchiest, most-delectable deep-fried foods that will put any food lover in a total frenzy.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Duelling Confessions
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead on the side of the road her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man. It would take forty years, an author and an expert in pedestrian accidents to find the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth
programme.desc: A high school gym teacher took time off from class to give his friend a ride home -- and never returned. Investigators suspected foul play, but without a body the case would be difficult to prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is killed by her mother and father in her own home. The parents say they acted in self-defence but the forensic evidence indicates otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire who flaunted his wealth is found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police must investigate one of their own when a detective says his wife shot herself in the head. While he claims he called 911 as soon as he could, evidence makes police doubt the detective's story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: Police say that a car crash, which killed an elderly woman, was murder and arson. The driver, the victim’s daughter, insisted it was an accident.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: If Looks Could Kill
programme.desc: Model Tara Lambert gets a hitman to kill her husband's ex and put her in a woodchipper, unaware that cameras were rolling.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Killer Dad: Chris Watts Speaks
programme.desc: ‘Loving’ father Chris Watts turns into one of the nation's most notorious killers overnight. Secret videos document a series of chilling murders from start to finish, revealing lies, a scandalous affair and a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Murder in the Church
programme.desc: Missy Bevers was a mom and a fitness instructor in her community. As she’s setting up for an early-morning workout class at the local church, surveillance cameras capture a disturbing series of images; her killer, lurking the halls.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Shopping With a Killer
programme.desc: 8-year-old Cherish Perrywinkle is lured out of a Walmart by a registered sex offender, but that’s just the beginning of a night of terror, all caught on camera.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Spring Break From Hell
programme.desc: 17-year-old Brittanee Drexel suddenly disappears from spring break in Myrtle Beach. She leaves a friend’s hotel and is never seen again. But the case comes alive when twisted and disturbing details start to emerge from a prison cell.

programme.title: Expedition X: Curse of the Old West Outlaw
programme.desc: Josh Gates' team heads west to investigate America's most haunted town. Locals claim the spirit of a notorious bandit spooks the town because of a wrongful hanging. Phil and Jess' investigation leads them into a dangerous abandoned gold mine.

programme.title: Expedition X: Terror on Doll Island
programme.desc: Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot power through camera malfunctions and emotional breakdowns in order to find an explanation of what is happening on the Island of the Dolls, a dangerous place that locals have long avoided.

programme.title: Expedition X: Devil in the Forest
programme.desc: After receiving brand-new, frightening reports, Josh Gates sends Jessica and Phil to the woods of southern New Jersey to hunt for the infamous Jersey Devil. Locals are terrified by a demonic creature that's terrorized them for more than 300 years.

programme.title: Expedition X: Uncovered: Cambodia's Jungle Monster
programme.desc: Phil and Jessica catch wind of human activity surrounding an ancient city and head deep into the Cambodian jungle to find a monster that's been terrifying locals for years.

programme.title: Josh Gates Tonight: Merry Josh-mas
programme.desc: Josh is in the holiday spirit with star of 'A Christmas Story' Peter Billingsley, actress Judy Greer of 'Uncle Frank' and 'The Wedding Planner' as well as Reginald VelJohnson of 'Die Hard.' Josh also visits Santa's Village.

programme.title: Expedition X: America's Lake Monster
programme.desc: When Josh Gates receives new, potential video proof of a giant creature living in Lake Champlain, he sends Phil and Jess to investigate the 30-foot serpent that's been spotted in the lake for generations. A dangerous dive uncovers new evidence.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Curse of the Golden Bell
programme.desc: Josh joins local divers in the Southeast Asian country of Myanmar to search for the ancient cursed Golden Bell of King Dhammazedi. To recover it, Josh dives into murky, violent waters that have claimed the lives of other divers.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mayan Apocalypse
programme.desc: Josh unearths human skulls and ancient Mayan sacrificial alters in the caverns underneath the jungles and ruins of Mexico while investigating the fall of the remarkable Mayan Empire.

programme.title: Josh Gates Tonight: Merry Josh-mas
programme.desc: Josh is in the holiday spirit with star of 'A Christmas Story' Peter Billingsley, actress Judy Greer of 'Uncle Frank' and 'The Wedding Planner' as well as Reginald VelJohnson of 'Die Hard.' Josh also visits Santa's Village.

programme.title: Expedition X: America's Lake Monster
programme.desc: When Josh Gates receives new, potential video proof of a giant creature living in Lake Champlain, he sends Phil and Jess to investigate the 30-foot serpent that's been spotted in the lake for generations. A dangerous dive uncovers new evidence.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Spanish Fortune, Found!
programme.desc: Josh travels the coast of Florida and to the newly opened country of Cuba in search of sunken treasure from a fleet of Spanish ships sunk in 1715. The hunt takes him deep into the Atlantic and into the previously sealed National Archives of Cuba.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Finding Fenn's Fortune
programme.desc: Josh Gates joins the hunt for a $2,000,000 treasure. He attempts to decode the clues of the modern day treasure's location by following a cryptic poem, leading him deep into the harsh Rocky Mountains.

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines: Giants of the North
programme.desc: See how tourists explore the far reaches of northern Canada and gain exclusive access to polar bears on custom-built rovers, and how the Twin Otter aircraft drops much needed supplies to isolated villages.

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines: Goliath Below Zero
programme.desc: Experts use a cutting-edge, all-terrain engineering marvel to access a perilous job site covered in snow; special insider access reveals how this modern marvel helps get the job done.

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines: Hi-Tech Mega Marvels
programme.desc: A special drone uses technology to fly deep into treacherous, hard-to-reach mountains on dangerous search and rescue missions, and a hi-tech ice machine works tirelessly at a Toronto airport to keep flights running in brutal conditions.

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines: Arctic's Toughest
programme.desc: The world's only actual all-terrain vehicle is an Arctic mega monster that can conquer land, snow, and water in dangerous conditions; elsewhere in avalanche country, only one machine can climb deadly mountains and protect a major highway.

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines: Monster of the Arctic
programme.desc: When melting ice threatens to flood a town, a 22-ton amphibious mega machine battles the elements to save the day; in the Arctic, the Canadian Air Force relies on a massive transport aircraft to deliver supplies and personnel to far-off places.

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines: Subzero Special Ops
programme.desc: Military search and rescue efforts in deadly arctic conditions rely on a specialized helicopter with unrivaled power and endurance, and special access reveals how it works; in the Alps, a monster snow blower keeps trains running in dangerous weather.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Saint Croix Swipe
programme.desc: Ken Cage and Danny Thompson try to repo two planes from a much-feared criminal. Meanwhile, Mike Kennedy's on a mission to repo a plane being stripped by a stolen-parts ring. And Kevin Lacey gets cozy with a debtor in order to swipe his classic jet.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Hired Guns
programme.desc: Ken Cage and Danny Thompson repo a tour bus. Kevin Lacey faces armed guards on a nighttime repo, and Mike Kennedy is caught in a gun-smuggling operation.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Diving for Repos
programme.desc: In Florida, Mike Kennedy goes underwater to seize a seaplane. Meanwhile, Ken Cage and Danny Thompson chase a debtor who's fooling them with phony flight plans.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Wounded Warbird
programme.desc: Kevin Lacey greenlights Heather Sterzick's first solo repo, but she pays the price for her mistakes. Mike Kennedy returns to his old stomping grounds in Puerto Rico to recover a relic from the old family business.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Get Rich or Die Flyin'
programme.desc: With three assets and three million bucks on the table, Kevin is looking at one of the most complex missions of his career. To pull it off, Kevin calls in Mike Kennedy. Meanwhile, Ken and Danny hunt down a one million dollar race boat.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Flying Blind
programme.desc: Repo Man Ken Cage attempts to nab two high-end yachts in two days. Kevin Lacey's favour for a friend turns into a white-knuckle landing under darkening Texas skies in a plane with no radio on a runway with no lights.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Lacey's Story
programme.desc: Lacey ballooned up over 600 lbs on pizza and ice cream and knows Dr. Now is her best hope for success. She must now rally her divorced parents around her for support and find a way to modulate her moods that won't include binge-eating.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Bettie Jo's Story
programme.desc: At just 24, Bettie Jo is eating her way towards 700 pounds. Housebound, she is reliant on her husband for even basic needs. Bettie Jo's future relies on her losing weight and her husband losing his fear that if she loses weight she will leave him.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Pauline's Story
programme.desc: At nearly 700 lbs., 51-year-old Pauline has an addiction to food that is killing her and taking over the life of her son, who is the primary caretaker.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Chad's Story
programme.desc: At 700 pounds, Chad's weight is dangerously out of control. After gastric bypass surgery, he quickly sheds pounds but faces a medical crisis when he does not follow the doctor's orders. In dire straits, Chad puts his weight-loss journey on the line.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: June's Story
programme.desc: June is 600 pounds, and copes with the tragic death of her son by eating. After gastric bypass surgery, she must confront the emotional issues driving her food compulsion. If she can stay on track, she can become the mother she desperately wants to be.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: June, Chad, and Pauline
programme.desc: Pauline's self-destructive behavior continues to be a problem. Chad strives to be a better father and husband as he continues his journey. June's progress stalls after frequent travel and wedding plans lead her to slip back into bad habits.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Solar Calculator, a Game Ball and a Cheerleader's Bosom

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Boobies

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Two Parts

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Two Parts

programme.title: Friends: The One Where the Monkey Gets Away

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stare Master

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crickets
programme.desc: The perfect place to film an IJ challenge. The customers after consuming Q's hot dog smoothie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripteased
programme.desc: Find out what prop Q asked to keep from the dental damn challenge, what glazed delight is known to give Joe great power and how a doctor's appointment inspired Murr's striptease punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Unmotivational Speaker
programme.desc: Find out which classic Joker’s lines are still being uttered and which of the Alma Mater’s gets mentioned. Plus, what inspired tonight’s punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Find out how the Jokers keep their cover while filming at the mall, and Q's favorite VR word. Plus, learn how long Joe was sore after the table-busting punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.
